case_title: WINGFIELD, CASEY MICHELLE et al VS THOMAS, SPENCER

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY WINGFIELD, CASEY MICHELLE ATINSKY, COURTNEY KEARNS, JENNIFER AS TO DEFENDANT THOMAS, SPENCER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-19-1997 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT C
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT THOMAS, SPENCER

CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $500.00 FILED BY THOMAS, SPENCER AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT WINGFIELD, CASEY MICHELLE ATINSKY, COURTNEY KEARNS, JENNIFER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-19-1997 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WINGFIELD, CASEY MICHELLE ATINSKY, COURTNEY KEARNS, JENNIFER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THOMAS, SPENCER $1,075.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,090.00, JUDGMENT REFLECTS PLFT'S REFUND OF $1775, REDUCED BY DEFTS'S PREVIOUS TENDER OF $699.20. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT THOMAS, SPENCER IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT WINGFIELD, CASEY MICHELLE ATINSKY, COURTNEY KEARNS, JENNIFER STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT THOMAS, SPENCER

ENTERED IN SCA 25167 ON 8-21-97. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
